name: clawnductor-cli
description: Cross-platform CLI for clawnductor — persistent Claude Code sessions, multi-agent ensembles, ultraplan, and fleet review. Zero external dependencies.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/validation.test.js dist-test/args.test.js dist-test/state.test.js dist-test/ensemble.test.js dist-test/session.test.js
